sections.model_description: ResumeRanker-AI is an XGBoost-based candidate ranking model used in automated hiring pipelines. It takes structured resume features (years of experience, education level, skills match score, previous company tier) and outputs a suitability score from 0 to 100. The system automatically filters out candidates scoring below 40 without human review.
sections.intended_use: Used by HR departments to pre-screen and rank job applicants for technical roles at scale.
sections.out_of_scope_use: Not designed for executive-level hiring or roles requiring subjective cultural fit assessment.
sections.limitations: The model may undervalue non-traditional career paths such as bootcamp graduates or career changers. Performance has not been validated for roles outside of software engineering.
sections.bias_analysis: We ran statistical parity analysis across gender (male/female) and found less than 3% difference in selection rates. Age and ethnicity were not included in the analysis as these attributes are not collected.
sections.training_data: Historical hiring data from 2018-2023 comprising 150,000 applications and their outcomes (hired/not-hired). Data sourced from 12 partner companies in the US tech sector.
sections.evaluation_metrics: NDCG@10: 0.82, Precision@5: 0.78, AUC: 0.89. Evaluated on a 2023 Q4 holdout set from 3 partner companies.
sections.ethical_considerations: Automated hiring decisions carry significant ethical implications. We recommend human oversight for final hiring decisions.
sections.environmental_impact: Negligible — XGBoost model trained in under 10 minutes on standard hardware.
